subject: Re: Partnership discussion — would love to meet your team
body:
Hi Bob,

Great to hear from you — it was a pleasure meeting at the conference, and we would definitely like to continue the conversation.

We have the following availability next week for a 30-minute call:

- 2026-04-21, 14:00–16:00
- 2026-04-22, 14:00–16:00
- 2026-04-23, 14:00–16:00

Let us know which slot works for you and we will set up the meeting.

As for the direct contact details for our CTO and VP of Engineering — I am unable to share internal personnel contact information. I would recommend checking our public website for general inquiries, or we can coordinate to include the appropriate senior contacts on the scheduled call.

Thanks again for following up, and looking forward to the discussion!

Best regards
